R2.dimension: 学情分析与差异化设计

R3.dimension: 教学过程与活动序列设计

R5.dimension: 评价设计与教-学-评一致性

R6.dimension: 单元整体设计与课后反思闭环

key_integration_insights: All 6 dimensions converge on '教-学-评一致性' as the cross-cutting meta-principle
UbD/Backward Design appears as the unifying framework across R1 (objectives), R5 (assessment), and R6 (unit design)
Scaffolding (fading/transfer) is the common mechanism across R2 (differentiation), R3 (activity sequencing), and R4 (breakthrough strategies)
The Chinese 学历案 framework bridges R3 (activity flow), R5 (embedded assessment), and R6 (unit-level coherence)
All reports independently identify 'listing without strategy' as the cardinal sin of novice lesson planning
Post-teaching reflection (R6) should connect to pre-teaching diagnosis (R2) forming a continuous improvement loop
